Explore The Atlantic Inn on Block Island.

Perched atop the highest point of Old Harbor, The Atlantic Inn has welcomed travelers since 1879. Six acres of rolling lawns and gardens. Twenty-three rooms blending Victorian charm with modern luxury. A chef-driven restaurant. A famous veranda where afternoons stretch into evenings.

The Inn — Old Harbor
The Entry Hall
The Sitting Room
Restaurant 1879
A Garden View Room
The Manor — Block Island
A peaceful setting just outside everything.
Rooms

Twenty-three rooms with deliberate preservation.

Every room uniquely decorated. Antique furniture paired with thoughtfully curated modern luxuries. Sweeping views — of the island, the ocean, town, or our surrounding fields. Newly remodeled, all air-conditioned, none quite alike.

Find Your Room
A Garden View Queen

What people are saying.

One of the most beautifully restored historic inns on Block Island.
— Fodor's Travel
Restaurant 1879 is a destination in its own right — Wine Spectator's Best of Award of Excellence, 2024.
— Wine Spectator
A veranda made for golden hour. The kind of place that makes you slow down without meaning to.
— OpenTable Diners' Choice
Our Restaurant

Restaurant 1879

Chef Francis Cavanagh leads our kitchen with menus that shift with what the island and its purveyors have on hand — quietly inventive, deeply seasonal, and always grounded in place.

View the Menus
Weddings & Events

Historic grounds. Contemporary gatherings.

Six acres above Old Harbor. The famous veranda. Warm, paneled rooms. The setting for weddings, milestone gatherings, and the long lunch — held in a place unlike anywhere else on Block Island.

Plan Your Event

The veranda is waiting.
